caption:
Neon lights hummed a lullaby I shouldn't have been listening to. 🌃

I adjusted my holographic bikini straps as the synth-rain began to cascade over the Neo-Tokyo megastructure. The summer air tasted like ozone and danger, a perfect cocktail for a night like this. My contact, Kael, tapped me on the shoulder as we slipped through the maintenance catwalks.

"You're too exposed," he whispered, eyes scanning the perimeter.

"Exposure is the point," I purred, leaning back against the warm metal. The fabric of my cybernetic swimsuit clung to me, glowing faintly in the ultraviolet glow of the corridor. Kael smirked, his own augmented arm flashing with static electricity. He wasn't here to save me, but to take advantage of my proximity. 

"The target is close," he said, pressing a micro-hydrophone to my ear. A heartbeat, then a digital signature. "She knows the security protocols. She's expecting us."

I leaned in, letting my synthetic skin shimmer under the emergency lights. "Then let's give her something she can't forget."

As the door slid open with a hydraulic hiss, I felt the hum of three turrets ahead. But I wasn't afraid. Not when the heat from his body warmed my back and the electric storm outside promised chaos. I turned to Kael, a slow smile spreading across my lips. The perfect time for an exit strategy. And maybe a little more than just a mission. 

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonNights #SciFiRomance #CyberpunkAdventures #HoloBikini #SummerVibes #TechNoir #CyberBabe #SynthRain #ElectricDesires
